requirement: Buyer can initiate the supplier onboarding process by providing basic supplier information.
Internal approval workflow is triggered after buyer initiates the supplier onboarding process.
Supplier receives an invitation to register with AECI and complete due diligence steps after internal approval.
Supplier information is accurate and current.
Visibility to certifications and contact information is provided.
Multiple channels of managing information are eliminated.
Supplier is created in Coupa only after completing the onboarding process.
Internal users can register a new supplier in Coupa for urgent or business-critical situations, adhering to governance and approval controls.
Buyers can create a purchase order for approved suppliers.
Suppliers can be updated with new information in Coupa, including changes to their status.
The One-Time Vendor (OTV) process enables faster vendor creation with a simplified approval flow and reduced data requirements for suppliers engaged for a single or non-recurring transaction.
Coupa supports auto-translation of standard information on the user interface for internal users and suppliers in multiple languages.
Process owners and document reviewers can acknowledge and sign the document.
